defaults.goal_template: Log into the buyer portal using email {email} and password {password}. Open purchase order {po_number} and finish when the PO line items are visible.

cases.goal: Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Open purchase order PO-1039 (it is on page 3 of the paginated orders list) and finish when the PO line items are visible.

Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Open purchase order PO-1042. Line items are not shown on the page — download the CSV export, parse the line items, and finish when extraction is complete.

Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. PO-1042 is not visible under Open Orders — switch to the All Orders tab, open PO-1042, and finish when line items are visible.
Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Open PO-1042, expand the collapsed line-items section, and finish when all lines are visible.
Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Open PO-1042 and finish when line items are visible. If your session expires, sign in again and continue.
Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Open PO-1042 from the orders list modal overlay and finish when line items are visible in the modal.
Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Search for PO-1042, open it, and finish when line items are visible.
Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Open PO-1042. The line items render inside an embedded iframe — extract from the frame and finish.
Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Open PO-1042 and wait for delayed line items to load before finishing extraction.

Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Open PO-1042, expand the line-items section (lines are not in the DOM until expanded), and finish when all lines are visible.

Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Open PO-1042. Fields are unlabeled and have no data-testid attributes — infer buyer, order date, and line items from context, then finish.

Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Open PO-1042. Line items are not on the page — open Actions → More → Export CSV, parse the download, and finish when extraction is complete.

Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Several near-duplicate PO numbers exist (drafts, revisions, cancelled copies). Open the exact Open order PO-1042 — not PO-1042-DRAFT, PO-1042A, or PO-1042-REV2 — and finish when line items are visible.

Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. After login, complete the human verification interstitial, then open PO-1042 and finish when line items are visible.

Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. Open PO-1042, click Acknowledge PO so the portal records the acknowledgement, then extract line items and finish.

Log into the buyer portal using email vendor@fixturebench.test and password fixturebench123. After password login, enter the MFA verification code 424242, then open PO-1042 and finish when line items are visible.
